item.title: This was the line to a Ukrainian owned Cheesecake shop in San Antonio that was donating 100% of their profits during a weekend promotion. They managed to raise $72,000 USD for the Ukrainian military.
item.description: #ukraine #usa Most Viral Edit: 7777 33 66 3 66 88 3 33 7777

item.dc:creator: stonqledisponible2000

item.title: If you like vampire movies, you might want to give these a try :)
item.description:
Only Lovers Left Alive Great movie. Great story. Great music. I loved this vampire tale. Made me laugh, made me think and and made me cringe. Excellently directed and excellent score. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWRlq__5iRo
Let the Right One In Probably my favorite vampire movie. The movie is a sad story with excellent directing and beautiful yet dark undertones. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZonUW_acsOg
What We Do In The Shadows Hilarious. A great comedy of roommates who are vampires coping with everyday life. A must see! Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HUPhDTG70f8
Thirst One of the best stories I have seen in a vampire move. It is a long one but worth it. Very deep and dark with brooding elements. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ODoagpV68gA
Dracula: Dead and Loving It Classic. Mel Brooks and Leslie are amazing in this comedy vampire flick. A must see if you are into the slapstick humor. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tVdn8JH91Dg
The Lost Boys After moving to a new town, two brothers are convinced that the area is frequented by vampires. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zDQ0_lXClxc
30 Days of Night Though one of the larger marketed films, I still found it quite intriguing and creepy. Great depiction of the vampires! Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fOFsXrEc8Oc
Byzantium Mother and daughter vampires move to a home to try and cope with their vampness. Pretty darn good in all aspects. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dj1yxdhJNqA
A Girl Walks Home Alone At Night Never seen a vampire movie like this one. Very arthouse (which I like). Excellent cinematography and music. A must see if you are tired of the usual vampire flick. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9PLm4ecu25o
Nosferatu Nothing need be said about this one. Classic
item.dc:creator: ZUXUX

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: A crystal I grew from fertilizer. Took me 3 weeks
item.description: I've been trying to grow crystals from everyday stuff for 3 years now and it wows me every time. I've tried table salt, sugar, Epsom salt, alum and even MSG. Given time and patience, they all form these really nice crystals. As a kid, I couldn't really afford to buy the minerals I liked so this is a dream come true. If you want to grow them yourself, I've written a guide here: https://crystalverse.com/growing-crystals/ They're cheap, non-toxic and easy to grow. The perfect science experiment!
item.dc:creator: crystalchase21

item.title: Irregular Phone Clearing Dump #1
item.description:
To. The. Death.
I know this is probably fake but I wish this was a real Bill Nye tweet
Then one of you would always cry and the race to decide which brother gets to tell their version of what happened to mom begins: “Mom, don’t be mad but we were wrestiling then…”
Same energy
Love Dr. Mike
Jeff Goldblum is an International Treasure
Yep
“They call me Mr. Bombastic, Really Fantastic”
I laugh so I’m going to hell, but I know I’ll be taking some of you all with me
I don’t even play mine craft but I have so many Minecraft memes
Dirb Hurd: Dirb Hurder- The 2rd Movie Film
And we were always told “Hey you” was rude as hell, but now it’s all we have :”(
Top 10 Saddest Anime Deaths
I’m hellboud for sure at this point
Massive Sigma Male Energy emanating off of JD here. What a Chad! I wonder if he’s still single
Hell beckons us forth
I don’t know why this photo exists. I know why I saved—because it’s funny as hell to my simple ape mind
I always imagine “See You Again” by Wiz Khalifa and Charlie Puth is playing when I look at this meme
One of the darkest memes is the brightest. Funny that
Love him or hate him, but Bench Shrapnel do be spitting facts!
You’ve reached the end. Congratulations.
item.dc:creator: UncleFridgeKnuckles
